regions: Other foreign countries (Canada and Latin America)

manufacturing_locations: United States (Arizona, California, Florida, Illinois, Indiana, Michigan, Minnesota, New Jersey, Puerto Rico, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Virginia, Washington)
supply_chain.dependencies: Certain raw materials, components and finished devices are procured from sole source suppliers due to quality considerations, unique intellectual property considerations or constraints associated with regulatory requirements
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions, inflationary pressures, labor shortages, electronic components shortage, sole-source supplier dependencies, sterilization service provider dependencies, inability to meet demand due to supply chain challenges

regulatory_risks: FDA regulations and Medical Device Amendments requirements for product design, manufacture and marketing
European Union Medical Device Regulation (MDR) with staggered phase-in through December 2028
State licensing requirements for business operations and products
Quality System regulations and FDA inspections
China volume-based procurement process designed to decrease medical device prices
Healthcare cost containment measures and price regulation globally
Coverage and reimbursement policy changes from third-party payors
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance and enforcement
Healthcare fraud and abuse laws (anti-kickback, anti-bribery)
Privacy and data security regulations (HIPAA, GDPR, state privacy laws)
Product liability regulations and European Product Liability Directive revisions
European Representative Actions Directive (Collective Redress Directive) enabling class actions
Environmental laws and per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) regulations
Antitrust and competition laws affecting acquisitions
Tax law changes including OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax (15%)
Medical device reporting regulations in multiple jurisdictions
Import/export requirements and trade protection measures
Localization and protectionism policies in certain jurisdictions

sanction_risks: FCPA investigations in certain foreign countries
Contact by SEC, US Department of Justice and other regulatory authorities regarding foreign business activities
Russian Federal Security Service (FSB) sanctions and General License requirements for product imports to Russia
Geopolitical tensions between China and Taiwan
Wars in Ukraine and Middle East affecting operations
International trade disputes and sanctions compliance
